CustomField.label: Specific Instructions
CustomField.description: Hardcoded behavioral rules and guardrails for Penny on this trail. Injected into Layer 2 of the Penny prompt. Use for trail-specific constraints that override general behavior.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter specific rules Penny must follow for this trail. Example: Always check in on blockers before giving advice. Never recommend skipping sprint reviews. These rules override Penny's default behavior.
